first_run.rationale: The score is identical (4/10), and the core reasoning is consistent across both evaluations. Both versions correctly identify the candidate as a strong senior individual contributor who lacks the required formal people-management experience for the role. Minor differences in wording and the summarized years of experience ("18+" vs "15+") are within the range of run-to-run noise and do not alter the primary, valid reason for the low score.
